parameters.content:
## EMAIL__ApproveAndSend

Click endpoint for Slack approval buttons.

GET /api/email/approve-send

Required query fields:
- decision=approve or reject
- approval_id=<approvals.id>
- token=<request_payload.approval_token>

The token is generated by EMAIL__GenerateDraft and stored in approvals.request_payload. Approved requests send the Gmail draft. Rejected requests only update approvals and audit logs.
